w:r.w:t: Pupils will share their lunch with their friends in lunch time.
Pupils will tell the names of the things which they share with their friends.
Pupils will tell the name, Color and taste of their favorite vegetables.
IL will show pictures of vegetables and Pupils will tell the 1
IL will explain the activities of
and after that they will do their work independently.
: page #68. IL will mention the day and date on top of the page and check at the end.
diaries to bring butter or anything made up of butter from home for lunch.
IL to do a 5 min warm up with the pupils.
First of all, a zig-zag sketch should be made on the ground with different shapes. Like square, heart, circle, and star.

Start by jumping diagonally to execute the zig-zag drill. Then run in a box formation after four jumps. That is, run forward to the first square shape. Stay facing forward, but run laterally to the left to reach the second square shape, run in reverse to the third square shape, then run laterally to the right to the square shape.
What is the national language of Pakistan?
is the national language of Pakistan.
Which Dua do we say when we go upstairs.
Tomato, Potato, Carrot, Radish and Onion.
